text.div:
LinkIdTextCardinalityTypeDescription & Constraints
Questionnairehttp://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/Questionnaire/EmCare.B10-14.Symptoms.2m.p#0.1.0
EmCare.A.DE10Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth0..1decimalExpressions:
  • Initial Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value
EmCare.B10S1.DE05The client is reported to have or has had a cough0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2
EmCare.B10S1.DE06Length of time the client is reported to have or has had the cough0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE05 = ‘yes’
EmCare.B10S1.DE01The client is reported to have or has had difficulty breathing0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE05 = ‘no’
EmCare.B10S1.DE02The length of time the client has or has had difficulty breathing0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE01 = ‘yes’
EmCare.B11S1.DE01The client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B10S1.DE01 = ‘no’
EmCare.B11S1.DE02The length of time the client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE01 = ‘yes’
EmCare.B11S1.DE05The client is reported to have or has had blood in the stool in this Illness0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.B11S1.DE02 = ‘EmCare.B11S1.DE03’
EmCare.B12S1.DE02The client is reported to have or has had fever0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE05 = ‘no’and %EmCare.B7.DE08 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE09 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE10 = false And %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false
EmCare.B12S1.DE03The length of time the client has or has had fever0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 And (%EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = true or %EmCare.B12S1.DE02 = ‘yes’)
EmCare.B12S1.DE06The client has had fever present every day since the fever started0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE05‘
EmCare.B12S1.DE07The client is reported to be refusing to use a limb0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B12S1.DE06 = ‘no’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE03 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE04’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false)
EmCare.B12S1.DE08The client is reported to have,  has had, or appears to be in pain0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE07 = ‘no’
EmCare.B12S1.DE13The client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE08 = ‘no_pain’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE02 = ‘no’ and %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false
EmCare.B12S1.DE17The client has recently travelled to a high Malaria risk area0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and (%EmCare.B12S1.DE13 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE15’ or %EmCare.B12S1.DE13 = ‘EmCare.B12S1.DE16’)
EmCare.B13S1.DE01The client is reported to have had or has an ear problem0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B12S1.DE17 = ‘no’
EmCare.B13S1.DE02The client is reported to have had or has ear pain0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE01 = ‘no’
EmCare.B13S1.DE03The client is reported to have or has had ear discharge0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE02 = ‘no’
EmCare.B13S1.DE04The length of time client has or has had ear discharge0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE03 = ‘yes’
EmCare.B14S1.DE03The client is reported to have an eye problem0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B13S1.DE03 = ‘no’ or %EmCare.B13S1.DE04 = ‘EmCare.B13S1.DE05’
EmCare.B14S1.DE01The client is reported to have or has had a skin problem0..1choiceValue Set: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B14S1.DE03 = ‘no’
EmCare.B14S1.DE02The client is reported to have itchy skin0..1choiceExpressions:
  • Enable When: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B14S1.DE01 = ‘yes’

Documentation for this format

item.text: Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth
The client is reported to have or has had a cough
Length of time the client is reported to have or has had the cough
The client is reported to have or has had difficulty breathing
The length of time the client has or has had difficulty breathing
The client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
The length of time the client is reported to have or has had diarrhoea
The client is reported to have or has had blood in the stool in this Illness

valueExpression.expression: %EmCare.A.DE10>=2 and %EmCare.B11S1.DE05 = ‘no’and %EmCare.B7.DE08 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE09 = false and %EmCare.B7.DE10 = false And %EmCare.B12S1.DE01 = false

item.text: The client is reported to have or has had fever
The length of time the client has or has had fever
The client has had fever present every day since the fever started
The client is reported to be refusing to use a limb
The client is reported to have,  has had, or appears to be in pain
The client is in a high / low / no malaria risk area
The client has recently travelled to a high Malaria risk area
The client is reported to have had or has an ear problem
The client is reported to have had or has ear pain
The client is reported to have or has had ear discharge
The length of time client has or has had ear discharge
The client is reported to have an eye problem
The client is reported to have or has had a skin problem
The client is reported to have itchy skin
